revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Disambiguation pages]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24608848913|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:蟻通神社]]
'''Aritōshi Shrine''' (蟻通神社) refers to several {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|qid=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrine|1=Shinto shrine}}: * {{ill|Aritōshi Shrine (Izumisano)|ja|蟻通神社 (泉佐野市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Aritōshi Shrine (Izumisano)|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Izumisano|en|Izumisano|qid=Q852018|lt=Izumisano City|1=Izumisano}}, {{ill|Osaka Prefecture|en|Osaka Prefecture|qid=Q122723|lt=Osaka Prefecture|1=Osaka Prefecture}}. * Aritōshi Shrine - The former name of {{ill|Niukawakami Shrine|en|Niukawakami Shrine|qid=Q246370|lt=Niukawakami Shrine|1=Niukawakami Shrine (Q246370)}} in {{ill|Higashiyoshino, Nara|en|Higashiyoshino, Nara|qid=Q1203148|lt=Higashiyoshino Village|1=Higashiyoshino, Nara}}, {{ill|Yoshino District, Nara|en|Yoshino District, Nara|qid=Q1154558|lt=Yoshino District|1=Yoshino District, Nara}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|en|Nara Prefecture|qid=Q131287|lt=Nara Prefecture|1=Nara Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Aritōshi Shrine (Katsuragi)|ja|蟻通神社 (かつらぎ町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Aritōshi Shrine (Katsuragi)|1=Aritōshi Shrine (Katsuragi)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11625902}} - Located in {{ill|Katsuragi, Wakayama|en|Katsuragi, Wakayama|qid=Q1345594|lt=Katsuragi Town|1=Katsuragi, Wakayama}}, {{ill|Ito District, Wakayama|en|Ito District, Wakayama|qid=Q1131309|lt=Ito District|1=Ito District, Wakayama}}, {{ill|Wakayama Prefecture|en|Wakayama Prefecture|qid=Q131314|lt=Wakayama Prefecture|1=Wakayama Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Aritōshi Shrine (Tanabe)|ja|蟻通神社 (田辺市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Aritōshi Shrine (Tanabe)|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Tanabe, Wakayama|en|Tanabe, Wakayama|qid=Q304266|lt=Tanabe City|1=Tanabe, Wakayama}}, Wakayama Prefecture. {{Disambiguation|qq=}} {{translated page|ja|蟻通神社|version=39203830|comment=Imported full ja history}}
[[ja:蟻通神社]]
<!--Aritōshi Shrine--><!--Aritōshi Shrine-->
